description: Implement FGAP-146: rewrite every OPAQUE-class planning-vocabulary comment site in packages/*/src and scripts/ non-test files to plain English carrying the verified referent from analysis/2026-07-12-planning-vocabulary-jargon-enumeration.md (the enumeration of record: nine families, per-family glosses, per-file site lists), and in the same pass rewrite scripts/'s remaining tracker-ID comment citations (the class the completed ID program never reached there). Drop bare ordinals where an inline gloss already carries the meaning (Constraint N, locked decision N); define taxonomy terms where used (Bucket-2). LOCALLY-DEFINED and FALSE-POSITIVE classes per the enumeration are excluded and stay.
acceptance_criteria: Every OPAQUE-class site from the enumeration's nine families is rewritten to plain English carrying the family's verified referent -- no Cycle-N / Phase-X / Plan-N / Wave-N / F1/F2/G2/P4/P6 / carried-item-N / Divergence-N / spec-section ordinal remains in packages/*/src non-test comments except the enumeration's LOCALLY-DEFINED and FALSE-POSITIVE exclusions

scripts/ non-test comments carry no tracker-ID citations and no OPAQUE-class planning vocabulary -- both facets covered in the same pass, self-defined inline sequences (STEP 0..6 migration headers) excluded as locally-defined
Rewrites preserve each site's semantic content: a fresh reader learns what the comment taught, stated in terms of what the code does rather than which planning increment produced it
The comment-citation scanner reports zero instances repo-wide including scripts/ if its walk covers them; build, check, and full test suite exit 0
